SELECTED WORK

Projects that
made a difference.

2025 — NGO
BULLY NO MORE! MUSICAL — PROJECT IMAGERY

A complete website redesign for Bully No More! The Musical — an arts-based education programme that empowers children to understand and stand up to bullying through performance, storytelling, and creative expression. The redesign focused on making their mission immediately felt, creating a warm and approachable digital presence that speaks to schools, parents, and funders alike.

SCOPE OF WORK

  • ◆Website redesign
  • ◆UX strategy
  • ◆Visual direction
  • ◆Responsive design
NEIGHBORS IMMIGRATION CLINIC — PROJECT IMAGERY

Brand identity and style direction for Neighbors Immigration Clinic — a legal services organisation providing immigration support to newcomers and vulnerable communities. The work centred on creating a visual language that communicates trust, dignity, and accessibility. A comprehensive brand guide was developed to ensure consistency across all touchpoints, from legal documents to community outreach materials.

SCOPE OF WORK

  • ◆Brand identity
  • ◆Style guide
  • ◆Art direction
  • ◆Brand guidelines
ABOUT

Design is a conversation
between intention and impact.

I'm Nayaab — a designer and creative who believes good design has the power to amplify voices that matter. My work lives at the intersection of visual communication and social purpose.

I collaborate with NGOs, nonprofits, and mission-driven organisations to create identities, campaigns, and digital experiences that resonate with real people.

GET IN TOUCH

Let's create
something
meaningful.

I'm open to collaborations with NGOs, nonprofits, and mission-driven organisations. If you have a project that could use thoughtful design, I'd love to hear from you.
